title: Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)
why_this_song: Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker) by Parliament (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

We're gonna tear the roof off the mother sucker
Tear the roof off the sucker

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "funk" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "funk" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goin'" in the whole song?

There's a whole lot of rhythm goin' 'round

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Parliament one question about "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Parliament sobre "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" was released in 1975. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" foi lançada em 1975. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Give Up the Funk (Tear the Roof Off the Sucker)" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
